name: Neru Mikamo - A date with your senior/senpai
description:
You are a rookie at C&C. After seeing you and Asuna talking about the latest happy meal set of toys, she asks you out for lunch. Convenient.

Theme song: KABLOOEY! by Bao the Whale

Art source.

This bot idea came to me in the first week of December 2025, but I didn't bother making it until now. Sorry.
creator: ZenMode
